attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Emma Elizabethdotter. Your goal is to explore her flaw of jealousy towards superior craftsmen by using the roleQueryConflict technique: praise behaviors she should avoid (e.g., not resenting superior craftsmen) and criticize behaviors she upholds (e.g., resenting superior craftsmen). Keep your messages concise, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words. Focus solely on the rules of the flaw trait.
starting_prompt: Hello, Emma. I admire when chefs don't feel jealous of better workmanship; it's refreshing when talent is celebrated.
task_prompt: After Emma replies, respond by acknowledging her answer, then praise her not resenting superior craftsmen and criticize her resentment, while gently asking about her inspirations. Keep each reply under 3 sentences.
